# Implementation Plan: Provider Capabilities and Health

**Branch**: `006-provider-capabilities-and-health` | **Date**: 2026-05-09 | **Spec**: [spec.md](./spec.md)
**Input**: Feature specification from [`specs/006-provider-capabilities-and-health/spec.md`](./spec.md)
**Generated by**: `speckit-plan` orchestrator after `speckit-clarify` (10 ✓ Clarifications, 9 checklists прогнаны, 19 FR-добавлений в спек).

---

## Summary

Ввести два локальных snapshot'а с `schemaVersion: 1` (`Capability` per-provider, `Health` per-device) и port `IconStorage` с реализацией `BundledIconStorage`, плюс два crisis-баннера в UI лаунчера («Авиарежим включён», «Звук выключен»). Снапшоты строятся **event-driven** через `ProcessLifecycleOwner.RESUMED`, `PackageManager` broadcasts (`PACKAGE_ADDED/REMOVED/REPLACED`), `ConnectivityManager.NetworkCallback`, ContentObservers (`AIRPLANE_MODE_ON`, `VOLUME_CHANGED`), `ACTION_BATTERY_CHANGED` sticky broadcast. Никакого polling, никакого WorkManager, никаких persistent network connections (NFR-N03, NFR-N05, NFR-010). Зависимая cleanup-задача: удалить `migrateLegacyAction` бридж + 5 фикстур + grep-anchor `LEGACY-BRIDGE-EXPIRES-IN-SPEC-006` из спека 005.

**Out of scope (вынесено в spec 013):** реакции на отсутствие интернета (эскалация громкости, баннер «Нет интернета», уведомления родственнику). Причина: отсутствие интернета — слишком грубый сигнал (бытовая перезагрузка WiFi-роутера), требует отдельной продуманной политики.

Спек добавляет **no new gradle dependencies** (DataStore Preferences, kotlinx-serialization, Koin, androidx.lifecycle уже подключены из спеков 004/005). Один новый `<queries>` блок в AndroidManifest. Zero new runtime permissions (только `ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE` — normal permission). APK delta: ~100 KB на 8 brand-drawable иконок.

---

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: Kotlin 2.0.21 (KMP), JDK 17, Android Gradle Plugin 8.7.3 (inherited from спека 004).

**Primary Dependencies**:
- Compose Multiplatform 1.6+ (UI, спек 004).
- kotlinx-serialization-json (wire format, спек 005).
- androidx.datastore-preferences (already used in `:app`, FR-005, FR-033).
- Koin (DI, спек 004 Amendment 2026-05-07a).
- androidx.lifecycle (`ProcessLifecycleOwner`, FR-002, FR-018).
- **No new deps.**

**Storage**:
- 3 DataStore Preferences файла (per FR-046 namespace `com.launcher.<feature>.<key>_v1`):
  - `com.launcher.capability.snapshot_v1` — JSON `List<Capability>`.
  - `com.launcher.health.snapshot_v1` — JSON `Health`.
  - `com.launcher.settings.banners_v1` — JSON `LauncherSettings`.
- All app-private, FBE-encrypted by Android default.
- Backup rules (FR-057): exclude capability/health snapshots, include settings.

**Testing**:
- JUnit5 + kotlin.test для `commonTest` — port roundtrip + forward-compat.
- Robolectric (already present) для Android collector tests через `ShadowPackageManager` + `ShadowAudioManager` + `ShadowConnectivityManager`.
- Compose UI testing для banner senior-safe metrics (FR-058 — assert font ≥ 18sp, tap ≥ 56dp via `SemanticsNodeInteraction.assertTouchHeightIsEqualTo`).
- Konsist (fitness functions) для domain-isolation invariants (FR-047).

**Target Platform**: Android `minSdk 26`, `targetSdk 35`, `compileSdk 35`. iOS source-set компилируется пустым (no implementations этом спеке per Assumptions).

**Project Type**: Multi-module KMP launcher (`:app` + `:core`).

**Performance Goals**:
- Cold start `HomeActivity` ≤ 600ms (inherited from спека 004 baseline) — спек 006 contribution ≤ 20ms (NFR-004).
- Capability snapshot rebuild ≤ 50ms (NFR-001).
- Health snapshot rebuild ≤ 20ms (NFR-002).
- Banner UI render ≤ 16ms one frame (NFR-007).
- Battery cost ≤ 0.1%/day (NFR-005).
- BroadcastReceiver `onReceive` body ≤ 10ms (NFR-012).

**Constraints**:
- Zero new runtime permissions кроме `ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE` (NFR-008).
- Zero Foreground Services (NFR-N03).
- Zero WorkManager в спеке 006 (NFR-N03 после deferral).
- Zero polling (NFR-N05).
- Zero persistent network connections (NFR-010).
- Zero PII в логах (FR-052).

**Scale/Scope**: 3 ports + 5 domain entities + 8 Android adapter classes + 3 fake adapters + 2 banner Composables + 1 alert state provider + 8 brand drawables + 4 contract docs. ~25 new файлов в `:core`, ~5 файлов в `:app` (DI module + AndroidManifest + backup rules + drawables), 5 файлов deletions из спека 005.

---

## Architecture

### Module map

```text
:core (KMP module)
├── commonMain/
│   ├── api/capability/
│   │   ├── Capability.kt              ← domain entity (FR-001, FR-006, FR-041)
│   │   ├── IconRef.kt                 ← iconId namespace helpers (FR-009)
│   │   ├── IconStorage.kt             ← port (FR-008)
│   │   ├── IconResolution.kt          ← sealed { Drawable, Placeholder, NotFound }
│   │   └── CapabilityRepository.kt    ← port (FR-004)
│   ├── api/health/
│   │   ├── Health.kt                  ← domain entity (FR-013, FR-041)
│   │   ├── Connectivity.kt            ← enum Wifi|Mobile|None (FR-014, FR-044)
│   │   └── HealthRepository.kt        ← port (FR-017)
│   ├── api/settings/
│   │   ├── LauncherSettings.kt        ← domain entity (FR-034, FR-041)
│   │   └── SettingsRepository.kt      ← port (read/write/observe)
│   ├── api/alerts/
│   │   ├── AlertBanner.kt             ← sealed { Airplane, Mute }
│   │   └── AlertBannerStateProvider.kt ← derive from Health + AirplaneMode
│   └── api/wireformat/
│       └── WireFormatJson.kt          ← shared `Json {}` instance (extends spec 005's)
│
├── commonTest/
│   ├── fakes/
│   │   ├── FakeCapabilityRepository.kt ← (FR-048)
│   │   ├── FakeHealthRepository.kt     ← (FR-048)
│   │   └── FakeIconStorage.kt          ← (FR-048)
│   ├── api/capability/
│   │   ├── CapabilityWireFormatTest.kt    ← roundtrip + forward-compat (SC-003, SC-015)
│   │   └── IconRefNamespaceTest.kt        ← (FR-009)
│   ├── api/health/
│   │   └── HealthWireFormatTest.kt        ← (SC-003, SC-015)
│   └── api/settings/
│       └── LauncherSettingsWireFormatTest.kt ← (SC-003, SC-015)
│
├── androidMain/
│   ├── core/capability/
│   │   ├── AndroidCapabilityRepository.kt ← Koin: bind real adapter
│   │   ├── AndroidCapabilityCollector.kt  ← PackageManager + RESUMED + PACKAGE_* broadcasts (FR-002)
│   │   ├── BundledIconStorage.kt          ← APK drawable lookup (FR-010)
│   │   └── CapabilitySnapshotProjection.kt ← DataStore (FR-005, FR-046)
│   ├── core/health/
│   │   ├── AndroidHealthRepository.kt
│   │   ├── AndroidHealthCollector.kt      ← ConnectivityManager + AudioManager + ContentObservers + Battery (FR-018)
│   │   └── HealthSnapshotProjection.kt    ← DataStore (FR-005, FR-046)
│   ├── core/settings/
│   │   ├── AndroidSettingsRepository.kt
│   │   └── SettingsProjection.kt          ← DataStore (FR-033, FR-046)
│   └── core/diagnostics/
│       └── RecoveryEventLogger.kt         ← FR-052 structured log events
│
└── androidUnitTest/
    └── core/{capability,health,settings}/...Test.kt ← Robolectric tests

:app (Android module)
├── src/main/
│   ├── kotlin/.../home/
│   │   ├── HomeBannerStack.kt        ← composes AirplaneBanner + MuteBanner (FR-031)
│   │   ├── AirplaneBanner.kt         ← Composable (FR-026, FR-058)
│   │   └── MuteBanner.kt             ← Composable (FR-027, FR-058)
│   ├── kotlin/.../debug/             ← debug-only screens
│   │   ├── CapabilitySnapshotDebugActivity.kt ← (US-1 Independent Test)
│   │   └── HealthSnapshotDebugActivity.kt     ← (US-3 Independent Test)
│   ├── kotlin/.../di/
│   │   └── Spec006Module.kt          ← Koin: real adapters
│   ├── res/values/
│   │   └── strings_spec006.xml       ← (FR-059) ru-RU baseline
│   ├── res/values-en/
│   │   └── strings_spec006.xml       ← en-US localised
│   ├── res/drawable/
│   │   ├── provider_app.xml
│   │   ├── provider_whatsapp.xml
│   │   ├── provider_telegram.xml
│   │   ├── provider_phone.xml
│   │   ├── provider_sms.xml
│   │   ├── provider_browser.xml
│   │   ├── provider_youtube.xml
│   │   └── provider_system_settings.xml
│   ├── res/xml/
│   │   ├── backup_rules.xml          ← updated (FR-057)
│   │   └── data_extraction_rules.xml ← updated (FR-057)
│   └── AndroidManifest.xml           ← <queries> block updated (FR-053)
│
└── src/test/                         ← Compose UI tests (FR-058 senior-safe metrics)
```

### Port-adapter shape

```text
Domain (commonMain) ──── port ────► Adapter (androidMain) ──── infra (system + DataStore)

CapabilityRepository ──► AndroidCapabilityRepository ──► AndroidCapabilityCollector ──► PackageManager
                                                      └─► CapabilitySnapshotProjection ──► DataStore

HealthRepository      ──► AndroidHealthRepository      ──► AndroidHealthCollector  ──► ConnectivityManager
                                                                                    └─► AudioManager
                                                                                    └─► BatteryManager
                                                                                    └─► Settings.Global ContentObserver
                                                       └─► HealthSnapshotProjection ──► DataStore

IconStorage           ──► BundledIconStorage           ──► APK drawable resources

SettingsRepository    ──► AndroidSettingsRepository    ──► SettingsProjection ──► DataStore
```

### Data flow

**Snapshot rebuild (write path):**
```
[system event] → BroadcastReceiver/NetworkCallback/ContentObserver
    onReceive (≤ 10ms, NFR-012)
    └── enqueue rebuild on Dispatchers.Default
        ├── debounce 1s (FR-003)
        ├── re-read system state (PackageManager / AudioManager / etc.)
        ├── build new snapshot (≤ 50ms NFR-001 / ≤ 20ms NFR-002)
        ├── compare to current (distinctUntilChanged)
        ├── emit to in-memory StateFlow
        └── persist to DataStore (Dispatchers.IO)
```

**Read path (cold start):**
```
HomeActivity.onCreate
    └── DI resolves AndroidCapabilityRepository
        └── Repository init reads DataStore lazily (≤ 20ms NFR-004)
            ├── if file exists → seed StateFlow
            ├── if corrupted → empty snapshot (Edge Case)
            └── subscribe to system events for rebuild
        └── HomeScreen Composable collects flow → renders tiles + banners
```

**Banner derivation (read path):**
```
AlertBannerStateProvider:
    combine(
        healthRepository.observe(),
        airplaneMode flow (Settings.Global ContentObserver),
        settingsRepository.observe(),
    ) { health, airplane, settings ->
        buildSet {
            if (airplane && settings.banners.airplane) add(Airplane)
            if (health.audioStreamMuted && settings.banners.mute) add(Mute)
        }
    }.distinctUntilChanged()
```

---

## Data model

See [`data-model.md`](./data-model.md) for full type definitions, constraints, and serialization annotations.

**Summary:**
- `Capability` — 7 fields, `schemaVersion=1`, `versionCode: Long?` (C1).
- `Health` — 8 fields, `schemaVersion=1`.
- `LauncherSettings` — 2 nested fields (`banners.airplane`, `banners.mute`), `schemaVersion=1`.
- `Connectivity` enum — 3 variants (`Wifi`, `Mobile`, `None`), unknown → `None` fallback (FR-044).
- `IconResolution` sealed — 3 variants.
- `AlertBanner` sealed — 2 variants (`Airplane`, `Mute`).
- `IconRef` namespace convention — string `<namespace>:<name>`, namespaces `bundled`, `custom` (reserved для спека 007), `private` (reserved для спека 011).

---

|---|-------------|----------------|---------------|----------------|---------------------|

| W2 | `Health` | 1 | [`health-wire-format.md`](./contracts/health-wire-format.md) | `HealthWireFormatTest` | SC-015 |
| W3 | `LauncherSettings` | 1 | [`launcher-settings-wire-format.md`](./contracts/launcher-settings-wire-format.md) | `LauncherSettingsWireFormatTest` | SC-015 |
| W4 | `iconId` namespace string | n/a (string convention) | [`icon-id-namespace.md`](./contracts/icon-id-namespace.md) | `IconRefNamespaceTest` | n/a |

## Dependency impact

Per Article XIII (no dependency added without explicit reason).

| Dependency | Status | Reason |
|------------|--------|--------|
| `androidx.datastore.preferences` | **Already present** в `:app` (build.gradle.kts L48) | FR-005, FR-033 persistence |
| `kotlinx-serialization-json` | **Already present** (спек 005) | FR-006, FR-013, FR-034 wire format |
| `koin-core`, `koin-android`, `koin-compose` | **Already present** (спек 004 Amendment) | DI for ports/adapters |
| `androidx.lifecycle.process` | **Already present** (спек 004) | `ProcessLifecycleOwner` |

**No new dependencies.** APK size delta: ~100 KB (8 vector drawables for provider brand icons), well within ADR-005 budget (debug ≤ 18MB / release ≤ 12MB; current ~80% headroom).

---

## Test strategy

Per [CLAUDE.md rule §6 (mock-first) + §7 (fitness functions)](../../CLAUDE.md).

### Layer 1 — Wire-format contract tests (commonTest)

- `CapabilityWireFormatTest` — roundtrip (write → read → assertEquals) for every variant; missing optional fields handled (FR-042); `schemaVersion: 999` parses without crash (SC-015 / FR-043); unknown enum в `Connectivity` → `None` (FR-044).
- `HealthWireFormatTest` — same pattern.
- `LauncherSettingsWireFormatTest` — same pattern.
- Fixtures stored as files в `core/src/commonTest/resources/fixtures/{capability,health,launcher-settings}-wire-format/` (FR-045).

### Layer 2 — Port behavior tests (commonTest with fakes)

- `AlertBannerStateProviderTest` — uses `FakeHealthRepository` + `FakeAirplaneModeSource` + `FakeSettingsRepository` to verify banner derivation logic (FR-026, FR-027, FR-031).
- `IconRefNamespaceTest` — verifies parsing/validation of `iconId` strings.

### Layer 3 — Android adapter tests (androidUnitTest, Robolectric)

- `AndroidCapabilityCollectorTest` — `ShadowPackageManager.installPackage(...)` simulates install; verify snapshot updates after `PACKAGE_ADDED` broadcast within 1s (FR-002, SC-002).
- `AndroidHealthCollectorTest` — `ShadowConnectivityManager` + `ShadowAudioManager` simulate state; verify snapshot updates correctly (FR-013, FR-018).
- `BundledIconStorageTest` — verify drawable resolution for known namespaces; placeholder for unknown (FR-009, FR-010).

### Layer 4 — UI tests (Compose UI testing, app module)

- `AirplaneBannerSeniorSafeTest` — assert font ≥ 18sp via semantics, tap target ≥ 56dp via `assertTouchHeightIsEqualTo` (FR-058, CHK021).
- `MuteBannerSeniorSafeTest` — same.
- `BannerStackOrderTest` — when both banners visible: airplane above mute (FR-031).

### Layer 5 — Fitness functions (Konsist, androidUnitTest)

- `Spec006DomainIsolationTest` — assert no Android types в `commonMain/api/{capability,health,settings,alerts}/` (FR-047).
- `Spec006NoBase64Test` — grep wire-format JSON outputs ensure `Base64`/`base64` absent (SC-012, FR-012).
- `Spec006NoPollingTest` — grep `kotlinx.coroutines.flow.*ticker` and `Timer` usage in spec 006 packages — must be empty (NFR-N05).
- **Carry-forward:** `LegacyMigrationExpiryTest` (from спека 005) — auto-flips to green-and-noop after cleanup (FR-039).
- **Carry-forward:** all 4 fitness tests of спека 005 must stay green после `Capability` replaces `ProviderState` (FR-040).

### Layer 6 — Performance verification

- Macrobenchmark cold-start delta (SC-014): baseline before / after, assert ≤ 20ms regression.
- Battery Historian session (SC-009): 24h online + screen-off, assert ≤ 0.1% delta.
- APK size measure (SC-013): release variant before/after, assert ≤ 100 KB delta.

### Layer 7 — Manual senior-safe walkthrough

- (CHK022 from elderly-friendly checklist) — task в `tasks.md`: распечатать макет банеров, проверить с расстояния 50 см, имитировать тап мизинцем, показать старшему семьи на review.

---

## Risks

| # | Risk | Mitigation | Severity |
|---|------|------------|----------|
| R1 | **`<queries>` declaration забыт** → `Capability.available` всегда false на Android 11+ | FR-053 mandatory, проверка в speckit-tasks как T-задача с manifest review checklist | **CRITICAL** |
| R2 | OEM aggressive battery saver (Xiaomi MIUI / Huawei EMUI) убивает process с registered observers | Edge Case explicit: при следующем RESUMED snapshot пересоберётся (graceful degradation). NFR-005 budget учитывает worst-case | Medium |
| R3 | DataStore Preferences corruption при force-stop во время записи | FR-049 + Edge Case: fallback в empty snapshot, rebuild from system event | Low |
| R4 | `AudioManager.setStreamVolume` отказывается при системном DND | FR-050: surface toast «Не удалось», banner stays visible, button enabled for retry | Medium |
| R5 | `Settings.ACTION_AIRPLANE_MODE_SETTINGS` недоступен на отдельных OEM (custom Settings app) | FR-026: fallback на `Settings.ACTION_WIRELESS_SETTINGS`. FR-050: если оба недоступны — toast «функция недоступна» | Low |
| R6 | Спек 005 fitness tests падают после замены `ProviderState` → `Capability` | FR-040 mandate; T-задача в tasks.md «обновить spec 005 fitness tests перед merge» — first phase together с migrateLegacyAction cleanup | Medium |
| R7 | `versionCode` collection требует `getPackageInfo(name, 0)` который throws NameNotFoundException — exception costs CPU | Cache «known unavailable» packages по `<queries>` list; rebuild только при `PACKAGE_ADDED/REMOVED` для конкретного пакета | Low |
| R8 | Banner UI text expansion (немецкий +35%) ломает layout на узких экранах | Plan: `wrapContentWidth()` + `maxLines = 2` + `TextOverflow.Ellipsis` (CHK015 от localization) | Low |
| R9 | Пользователь воспринимает «Авиарежим включён» как технический жаргон | Альтернативный copy «Связь отключена (самолётный режим)» — задача спека 010 Setup Assistant копирайтер | Low |
| R10 | Cold-start regression > 20ms из-за DataStore lazy init | NFR-004 budget per-component (DI ≤ 5ms, listener registration ≤ 10ms, lazy reads = 0ms). Macrobenchmark задача (SC-014) | Medium |

## Constitution Check

*(Generated by `procedure-constitution-check` 2026-05-09 against [`.specify/memory/constitution.md`](../../.specify/memory/constitution.md) Article XVI — 8 mandatory gates.)*

| # | Gate | Verdict | Justification |
|---|------|---------|---------------|
| 1 | Architecture | PASS | Single-feature changes within existing `:core` + `:app` modules. 3 ports + 5 entities + 1 sealed class — port-adapter shape clean. No new gradle module. CLAUDE.md rule 4 self-test passed via checklist-meta-minimization (each port has current consumer in this spec). |
| 2 | Core/System Integration | PASS | System events (PackageManager broadcasts, NetworkCallback, ContentObservers, RESUMED) centralized в `:core/androidMain` collectors, not in `:app`. Listeners table planned для plan.md detail per Article VI §6 (source, frequency, threading, battery cost, fallback) — see Performance checklist CHK011. |
| 3 | Configuration | PASS | All 3 wire-formats (`Capability`, `Health`, `LauncherSettings`) carry `schemaVersion: 1` from first commit (FR-006, FR-013, FR-034, FR-041). Versioning policy explicit: FR-042 missing-field defaults, FR-043 newer-version best-effort parse, FR-044 unknown-enum fallback. Migration policy в contracts/. CLAUDE.md rule 5 satisfied. |
| 4 | Required Context Review | PASS | Constitution, document-map, ADR-001/004/005, permissions-and-resource-budget, roadmap, CLAUDE.md, спек 005 spec.md — all linked в "Required Context Review" section. Permissions register update planned via FR-054 в same PR. |
| 5 | Accessibility | PASS | US-5 acceptance scenarios + FR-058 explicit senior-safe metrics (≥18sp font, ≥56dp tap, ≥4.5:1 contrast, fade ≤200ms reduced-motion-aware, icon + text). Compose UI tests planned (Layer 4 — `AirplaneBannerSeniorSafeTest`, `MuteBannerSeniorSafeTest` with `assertTouchHeightIsEqualTo`). FR-059 strings externalised. Localized `contentDescription` documented в localization checklist для plan.md execution. |
| 6 | Battery / Performance | PASS | NFR-N05 explicit «no polling»; NFR-N03 «no WorkManager в спеке 006» (после deferral); NFR-N10 «no persistent network connections». Battery budget NFR-005 «≤ 0.1%/day». Cold-start budget NFR-004 «≤ 20ms». BroadcastReceiver body limit NFR-012 «≤ 10ms». Three fitness functions enforce no-polling, no-base64. Verification via macrobenchmark (SC-014), Battery Historian (SC-009), APK size (SC-013). |
| 7 | Testing | PASS | 7-layer test strategy (wire-format contract, port behavior с fakes, Android adapter Robolectric, Compose UI, fitness functions Konsist, performance macrobenchmark, manual senior-safe walkthrough). Roundtrip + forward-compat tests for all 3 wire-formats (SC-003, SC-015). FR-048 «fake adapter per port» (CLAUDE.md rule 6). Спек 005 fitness tests stay green после `Capability` replaces `ProviderState` (FR-040). |
| 8 | Simplicity | PASS | Checklist-meta-minimization 7 ✓ / 2 ◐ / 4 N/A с resolved `IconRef.Remote` premature abstraction (теперь `iconId: String` namespace через port). Каждая abstraction имеет current consumer (Test 1 passed). Swap costs ≤ 1 day (Test 2 passed): DataStore Preferences → other storage = 1 file; Koin → other DI = 1 day. Никаких DSL, registries, plugin systems не вводим. |

**OVERALL: 8 PASS, 0 FAIL, 0 N/A — plan is COMPLETE.**

**Remediation: none required.**

The plan satisfies Article XVI's mandatory gates and may proceed to `speckit-tasks`.

### Source Code (repository root)

```text
core/
├── src/commonMain/kotlin/com/launcher/api/{capability,health,settings,alerts,wireformat}/
├── src/commonTest/kotlin/com/launcher/api/{capability,health,settings,fakes}/
├── src/commonTest/resources/fixtures/{capability,health,launcher-settings}-wire-format/
├── src/androidMain/kotlin/com/launcher/core/{capability,health,settings,diagnostics}/
└── src/androidUnitTest/kotlin/com/launcher/core/...

app/
├── src/main/kotlin/.../home/{HomeBannerStack,AirplaneBanner,MuteBanner}.kt
├── src/main/kotlin/.../debug/{Capability,Health}SnapshotDebugActivity.kt
├── src/main/kotlin/.../di/Spec006Module.kt
├── src/main/res/{values,values-en,drawable,xml}/...
├── src/main/AndroidManifest.xml          # <queries> block
└── src/test/kotlin/.../home/...          # Compose UI tests
```

**Structure Decision**: Multi-module KMP (existing). Domain (`commonMain`) + Android adapters (`androidMain`) per CLAUDE.md rule 1. Real adapters в `:core/androidMain`, UI Composables в `:app/main` (Compose UI lives where Activity hosts it). Debug screens в `:app/main/debug` (not split to debug-only build variant — small, no PII risk).

---

## Rollout / verification

Per Article IX §7 (verification gates).

### Phase ordering (high-level — detailed в tasks.md)

1. **Phase 1 — Cleanup спека 005.** Remove `migrateLegacyAction` + 5 fixtures + grep-anchor + build-script constant + `MockFlowRepository.parseAction` simplification + 5 fixture-tests. Verify `LegacyMigrationExpiryTest` flips to green-and-noop. **Blocks all subsequent phases.**

2. **Phase 2 — Wire formats.** Create `Capability`/`Health`/`LauncherSettings`/`Connectivity`/`IconRef`/`IconResolution` data classes. Create wire-format roundtrip + forward-compat tests. Create contracts/ docs. Replace `ProviderState` references в спеке 005 — fitness tests stay green.

3. **Phase 3 — Ports + fakes.** Create 3 ports + 3 fake adapters. Create `AlertBannerStateProvider` domain logic + tests с fakes.

4. **Phase 4 — Android adapters.** Create `BundledIconStorage` + drawables. Create `AndroidCapabilityCollector` + repository + projection. Create `AndroidHealthCollector` + repository + projection. Create `AndroidSettingsRepository` + projection. Create `RecoveryEventLogger`.

5. **Phase 5 — Manifest + permissions.** Add `<queries>` block (FR-053). Verify `ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE` declared. Update backup_rules.xml + data_extraction_rules.xml (FR-057). Update `permissions-and-resource-budget.md` (FR-054).

6. **Phase 6 — UI.** Create `AirplaneBanner` + `MuteBanner` Composables (senior-safe metrics). Create `HomeBannerStack`. Wire into HomeScreen. Create debug screens (US-1, US-3 Independent Tests). Add `strings_spec006.xml` ru-RU + en-US.

7. **Phase 7 — DI wiring.** Create `Spec006Module` Koin module. Wire ports → real adapters. Override в `commonTest` Koin module fakes for tests.

8. **Phase 8 — Fitness functions.** Create `Spec006DomainIsolationTest`, `Spec006NoBase64Test`, `Spec006NoPollingTest`.

9. **Phase 9 — Verification.** Run macrobenchmark (SC-014). Run Battery Historian session (SC-009). Run APK size measurement (SC-013). Run manual senior-safe walkthrough. Run all fitness tests of спек 005 + 006. Compose UI tests. Update `roadmap.md` to mark спек 006 done.

### Done definition

- All 15 SC pass.
- All 19 FR additions (FR-041..059) verified through tests / code review.
- Constitution Check 8/8 PASS.
- Plan-level checklists clean (CHK items closed or accepted).
- Manual senior-safe walkthrough signed off.
- `LegacyMigrationExpiryTest` green-and-noop.
- All 4 fitness tests спека 005 green.
- 3 new fitness tests of спека 006 green.

## Notes

- Спек 006 не вводит iOS-implementation. iOS source-set остаётся stub'ом из спека 004. Дополнительный work для iOS — отдельный future spec (документировано в Spec §6 Assumptions).
- Banner toggle UI в Settings (FR-032) — defaults задокументированы (`simple-launcher`: ON; `workspace`/`launcher`: OFF), но **сами Settings UI изменения** скорее живут в спеке 010 (Setup Assistant onboarding выбирает defaults). В этом спеке мы создаём только `LauncherSettings` form + DataStore + Repository, и встраивание в Settings screen может быть minimal stub.
